XOnlineContentVerify

Begins the verification of a specified offering that has been downloaded and installed. The function creates an asynchronous task to perform the verification.

HRESULT XOnlineContentVerify(
    XONLINEOFFERING_ID OfferingId,
    PBYTE pbBuffer,
    DWORD *pcbBuffer,
    HANDLE hWorkEvent,
    XONLINETASK_HANDLE *phTask
);

Parameters

OfferingId
[in] Unique identifier associated with the offering to be verified. This identifier is obtained from an XONLINEOFFERING_INFO structure when available offerings are enumerated.
pbBuffer
[in, optional] Pointer to a buffer that will be used internally by the function to process the verification. No results are returned in this buffer. If this parameter is NULL, the function will automatically allocate a buffer.
pcbBuffer
[in, out] Pointer to a variable that specifies the size, in bytes, of the buffer pointed to by pbBuffer. If the buffer size is too small, the function sets this variable to the buffer size needed and then returns a failure code. If pbBuffer is NULL, a sufficiently large buffer size must still be specified in pcbBuffer, or the function will fail. The buffer size should be at least the size of two hard disk sectors. (The hard disk sector size can be determined by calling XGetDiskSectorSize.)
hWorkEvent
[in, optional] Handle to an event that will be signaled when there is work to be done on the verification task. This parameter can be NULL if no such event is required.
phTask
[out] Pointer to a variable of type XONLINETASK_HANDLE that receives a task handle representing this verification request. The handle can then be used in calls to XOnlineTaskContinue to perform work associated with this task.

Return Values

If the function succeeds, the return value is S_OK.

Remarks

The offering must be installed before it can be verified.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

Xbox Live Functions | XOnlineContentInstall, XOnlineTaskContinue, XGetDiskSectorSize
